_comment: Carson's active support/resistance levels. Each level has status 'active', 'hit', or 'invalidated'. The brief workflow MUST read this file before writing and reference active levels in the brief. After the data drop, check if any active levels were hit (compare against intraday H/L) and update status accordingly.

levels.notes: Carson's active support level. Still untouched through April 14 (Tuesday intraday low was $687.66). Projected retracement target in the event of sustained downside.

Intermediate resistance. Lower bound of the first resistance band (with 685.85) below the major zone at 691.90-693.20. HIT on April 13 as SPY printed an intraday high of $686.30 and closed at $686.10.

Intermediate resistance. Upper bound of the first resistance band (with 683.70) below the major zone at 691.90-693.20. HIT on April 13 as SPY printed an intraday high of $686.30 and closed at $686.10.

Lower bound of Carson's major resistance zone ($691.90-$693.20). HIT on April 14 as SPY cleared the zone with an intraday high of $694.58 and a close of $694.46. Carson had anticipated a meaningful concentration of sell-side order flow here but allowed for a sustained breakout; the breakout materialized.

Upper bound of Carson's major resistance zone ($691.90-$693.20). HIT on April 14 as SPY cleared the zone with an intraday high of $694.58 and a close of $694.46. The clean breakout opens the path toward all-time highs per Carson's framework.
